description: Structured response for act mode. Gather information, run code, modify the project.

todo.description: Tools to execute. Only read files that exist in the project file listing. Never edit a file before reading it.

tool.description: read: retain a project file for reading. drop: remove an irrelevant file from context. env: exploratory read-only command. delete: delete a file. run: shell command that changes the environment.

argument.description: File path (must exist in project) or shell command depending on tool.

description.description: Brief explanation of why this tool is being used.

known.description: Facts, analysis, and plans relating to the plan of action.

unknown.description: Things you still need to find out before acting. Empty array if nothing is unknown.

edits.description: File modifications. Use edits to create, edit, or modify files. Do not describe changes in known/summary — put them here.

file.description: File path to modify or create.

search.description: Exact text to find in the file. Empty string to create a new file or append to end.

replace.description: Replacement text, or full content for new files.

prompt.description: Optional. Ask the user a multiple choice question.
